details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.repair_ledger_faucet_parts
alias: repair_ledger_faucet_parts
purchased_on: 2025-12-28
total_eur: 32
counterparty: Hörnbach Österreich
project: Repair Ledger
related_entity: Petra Novak
lines:
  - item: faucet cartridge
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 24
    line_eur: 24
  - item: seal set
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Kitchen faucet repair parts

```text
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| field          | value                           |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                            |
| bill_id        | bill.repair_ledger_faucet_parts |
| alias          | repair_ledger_faucet_parts      |
| purchased_on   | 2025-12-28                      |
| total_eur      | 32                              |
| counterparty   | Hörnbach Österreich             |
| project        | Repair Ledger                   |
| related_entity | Petra Novak                     |
+----------------+---------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item             | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | faucet cartridge | 1   | 24       | 24       |
| 2 | seal set         | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL            |     |          | 32       |
+---+------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Exactly the kind of household fix that becomes folklore unless Miles captures the receipt and part numbers.

next_step.current_state: First Petra bill migration write succeeded. Proceeding to migrate second Petra-related bill with schema frontmatter while preserving original body exactly.

next_step.observation: Successfully wrote updated frontmatter+body for 50_finance/purchases/2025_12_28__eur_000032__bill__repair_ledger_faucet_parts.md.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request and OCR-migrated all bills related to Petra Novak by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body. Updated files: 2025_12_28__eur_000032__bill__repair_ledger_faucet_parts.md and 2026_04_05__eur_000020__bill__studio_parts_magnet_and_felt.md. Then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, read nested AGENTS files on folder entry, consulted required system workflows/schemas for inbox + OCR migration, resolved entity canonically before finance lookup, preserved note bodies verbatim under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/petra.md identified Petra Novak. Finance search over purchases found records with related_entity Petra Novak, and both matched bill files were read and updated with required bill-schema frontmatter fields and line items per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, with original content preserved per migration workflow. Inbox request file was then deleted per inbox workflow.
